Cut florets off of the cauliflower heads, around 1 inch size piece or bite size (similar to Crispy Shrimp sizes)
In a lexon, place batches of the cauliflower florets and some reserved excess GF flour
Place lid over the lexan and shake the cauliflower and flour to coat as a dredge
In a mixing bowl, combine all other ingredients to form batter.  Mix until homogenous
Remove the coated cauliflower and batter and fry in a ~350°F fryer
Fry until lightly golden or yellow in colour on the batter.
Allow to drain excess oil in fryer basket while frying next batches
Reserve drained cauliflower to sheet tray to cool
Cool full sheet trays in blast chiller
Reserve to hotel pans in the cooler for service.
